meta.title: Products Every Civic Citizen Should Own
meta.description: Small investments, big civic impact. These products help you practice what you preach — and support this website too! 🙏

affiliateNoteHtml: ⚠️ Affiliate Disclosure: This page contains affiliate links. If you purchase through these links, CivicSense may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. This helps us keep the content free for everyone. Thank you for your support! 🙏

items.name: Reusable Trash Bag for Car
items.description: Compact, waterproof car bin that hooks on headrests. No more throwing wrappers out the window! Available in 5 colours.

items.name: Kitchen Compost Bin
items.description: Convert wet kitchen waste into compost in 30 days. Odour-free lid, 3L capacity — perfect for apartments. Save money on fertiliser too.

items.name: Tap Aerator Set (3 pcs)
items.description: Reduces water flow by 60% without reducing pressure. Easy to install, saves hundreds of litres per month per tap. Best investment ever.

items.name: 3-Bin Waste Segregation Set
items.description: Wet, dry, and hazardous — all sorted! Colour-coded bins with labels. Makes government-mandated waste segregation effortless at home.

items.name: Know Your Rights – India Book
items.description: A simple, jargon-free guide to RTI, consumer rights, property laws, and citizen duties. Must-have for every Indian household.

items.name: Reusable Jute Shopping Bag (5 pack)
items.description: Ditch plastic forever. These sturdy jute bags can carry up to 10 kg and last years. Makes you the most civic-conscious shopper in the queue.
